---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

:::{.window-container}

:::{.window-header}
Welcome!
:::

:::{.window-body}

# Hi! [I'm Ariane]{.highlight}

### Scientist, Engineer, and Analyst

```{=html}
<div class="main-nav-icons">
  <div class="icon-item">
    <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
    <span>about</span>
  </div>
  <div class="icon-item">
    <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i>
    <span>links</span>
  </div>
  <div class="icon-item">
    <i class="bi bi-folder"></i>
    <span>work</span>
  </div>
  <div class="icon-item">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope-at"></i>
    <span>contact</span>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

:::
